caption: A man with a distinctive tall, silver-grey hairstyle, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with tan suspenders and a small brown bowtie. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, appearing to speak as his facial expression shifts slightly across the sequence. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. To his right, a red logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" is visible, while to his left, a white and red logo says "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, though his mouth moves and his gaze shifts slightly, indicating he is in the middle of a conversation or recording a podcast.
